mapper.select: select id as id, username as username, password as password, real_name as realName, phone as phone, email as email, role as role, role_code as roleCode, primary_role_code as primaryRoleCode, avatar as avatar, avatar_url as avatarUrl, gender as gender, birthday as birthday, status as status, remark as remark, last_login_time as lastLoginTime, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime, created_time as createdTime, updated_time as updatedTime, is_deleted as isDeleted from sys_user where id = #{id}

select id as id, username as username, password as password, real_name as realName, phone as phone, email as email, role as role, role_code as roleCode, primary_role_code as primaryRoleCode, avatar as avatar, avatar_url as avatarUrl, gender as gender, birthday as birthday, status as status, remark as remark, last_login_time as lastLoginTime, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime, created_time as createdTime, updated_time as updatedTime, is_deleted as isDeleted from sys_user order by id desc

select id, username, password, real_name as realName, phone, role, role_code as roleCode, primary_role_code as primaryRoleCode, email, status, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime, created_time as createdTime, updated_time as updatedTime, is_deleted as isDeleted from sys_user where is_deleted = 0 and ( role_code in ('OWNER', 'DESK') or role in ('owner', 'desk') ) and ( #{keyword} is null or #{keyword} = '' or username like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or real_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or phone like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') ) order by id desc
